Parameters.Description: API Key of the MISP account.

Number of hours before the first connector iteration to retrieve attributes from. This parameter applies to the initial connector iteration after you enable the connector for the first time, or used as a fallback value in cases where connector's last run timestamp expires.
How many attributes to process per one connector iteration.
Lowest severity that will be used to fetch alerts. Possible values: 1-4.
Filter attributes by their type, comma separated. If provided, only attributes with whitelisted type will be processed.
Filter attributes by their category, comma separated. If provided, only attributes with whitelisted category will be processed.
Filter attributes by their parent event's galaxy, comma separated. If provided, only attributes that belong to an event with a whitelisted galaxy will be processed.
If enabled, verify the SSL certificate for the connection to the CheckPoint Cloud Guard server is valid.
Describes the name of the field where the environment name is stored. If the environment field isn't found, the environment is the default environment.

A regex pattern to run on the value found in the "Environment Field Name" field. Default is .* to catch all and return the value unchanged. Used to allow the user to manipulate the environment field via regex logic. If the regex pattern is null or empty, or the environment value is null, the final environment result is the default environment.
The address of the proxy server to use.
The proxy username to authenticate with.
The proxy password to authenticate with.

Parameters.DisplayName: CA Certificate File - parsed into Base64 String
Parameters.Description: CA Certificate File - parsed into Base64 String
